message:
🌱 Add etcd: auth token invalid after watch reconnects mission (#1735)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "etcd-11954-auth-token-invalid-after-watch-reconnects",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "etcd: auth token invalid after watch reconnects",
+    "description": "auth token invalid after watch reconnects. Requested by 6+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current etcd deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your etcd version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n etcd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=etcd\nhelm list -n etcd 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working etcd installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review etcd configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant etcd configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n etcd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=etcd\nkubectl get configmap -n etcd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=etcd\n```\n# Reproduce Procedure\n\n1. prepare etcd cluster with 3 nodes and respective etcdctl\n\n```\n\netcd Version: 3.4.9\nGit SHA: Not provided (use ./build instead of go build)\nGo Version: go1.14.2\nGo OS/Arch: linux/amd64\n```\n\nthough I don't think configure"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for auth token invalid after watch reconnects",
+        "description": "Sorry for late reply, I was on sick leave during last a few days.\n\nIn my first attempt, I was going to implement refresh on the grpc mechanism, PerRPCCredentials.GetRequestMetadata, until I encountered a grpc issue https://github.com/grpc/grpc-go/issues/3749, which was  fixed in\n```yaml\n/go/src/github.com/coreos/etcd # etcd --version\netcd Version: 3.4.9\nGit SHA: Not provided (use ./build instead of go build)\nGo Version: go1.14.2\nGo OS/Arch: linux/amd64\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade etcd to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade etcd:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade etcd etcd/etcd --namespace etcd\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n etcd\nhelm list -n etcd\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n etcd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=etcd\nkubectl get events -n etcd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"auth token invalid after watch reconnects\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Sorry for late reply, I was on sick leave during last a few days.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "/go/src/github.com/coreos/etcd # etcd --version\netcd Version: 3.4.9\nGit SHA: Not provided (use ./build instead of go build)\nGo Version: go1.14.2\nGo OS/Arch: linux/amd64",
+        "name: etcd2\ndata-dir: /data/zz_6129484611666145821\nlisten-peer-urls: http://0.0.0.0:23800\nlisten-client-urls: http://0.0.0.0:23790\ninitial-advertise-peer-urls: http://10.213.20.39:23800\nadvertise-client-urls: http://10.213.20.39:23790\ninitial-cluster: etcd0=http://10.213.20.40:23800,etcd1=http://10.213.20.38:23800,etcd2=http://10.213.20.39:23800\ninitial-cluster-token: zz\ninitial-cluster-state: new\nauto-compaction-retention: \"1\"\nquota-backend-bytes: -1",
+        "etcdctl user add root\n# then type root password, mine is 'root'\netcdctl --user root:root auth enable"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "etcd",
+      "graduated",
+      "orchestration",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+      "etcd"
+    ],

+      "issue": "https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd/issues/11954",

+    },
+    "reactions": 6,
+    "comments": 12,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with etcd installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
